emails.subject: Dynegy Power Corp. Master
emails.body: Dynegy Power Corp. Master We have a really old agreement with the referenced counterparty and I don't think we use it to trade under anymore. I spoke to the Confirm Desk and it appears all of our trading is under Dynegy Marketing and Trade. If you concur, I would like to inactive that master, since I'm afraid it might get attached for online trading.

emails.subject: Re: Dynegy Power Corp. Master
emails.body: Re: Dynegy Power Corp. Master Ok by me. I actually have a list of master issues that I would like to discuss sometime soon that are similar to this. Thanks! From: Tana Jones on 11/09/2000 03:28 PM
